recommendations.title: Italiano medio

recommendations.title: Omicidio all'italiana
recommendations.overview: To save his crumbling and rapidly-depopulating rural town, its mayor fakes a gruesome murder to attract media attention. His plan initially succeeds, but soon the situation will spiral out of control.

recommendations.title: Thor: Ragnarok
recommendations.overview: Thor is imprisoned on the other side of the universe and finds himself in a race against time to get back to Asgard to stop Ragnarok, the destruction of his home-world and the end of Asgardian civilization, at the hands of a powerful new threat, the

recommendations.title: I, Daniel Blake
recommendations.overview: A middle aged carpenter, who requires state welfare after injuring himself, is joined by a single mother in a similar scenario.

recommendations.title: Sorry to Bother You
recommendations.overview: In an alternate present-day version of Oakland, black telemarketer Cassius Green discovers a magical key to professional success – which propels him into a macabre universe.

recommendations.title: Inuyashiki
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged office worker encounters aliens and is gifted with alien technology and limitless powers.

recommendations.title: Parallels
recommendations.overview: An underground MMA fighter must confront his sister and his past in an adventure through parallel universes

recommendations.title: Old Dads
recommendations.overview: A cranky middle-aged dad and his two best friends find themselves out of step in a changing world of millennial CEOs and powerful preschool principals.

recommendations.title: Goodbye Mr. Loser
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged loser travels back in time to his high school years to put his life on the right track.

recommendations.title: Regular Show: The Movie
recommendations.overview: After a high school lab experiment goes horribly wrong, Mordecai and Rigby must go back in time to battle an evil volleyball coach in order to save the universe — and their friendship.
